meta-description: Learn about full-time employees by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Full-time employee (FTE)
excerpt: Any employee who works an average of at least 30 hours per week for more than 120 days in a year. Part-time employees work an average of less than 30 hours per week.
content:
Any employee who works an average of at least 30 hours per week for more than 120 days in a year. Part-time employees work an average of less than 30 hours per week.

  • For employers: Find out how to count your FTEs and see if you qualify for SHOP
